title: ExecutionTraceArtifact
description: Execution outcomes for every node that was dispatched during a run. All property names are camelCase.

ExecView.title: ExecView
ExecView.description: Execution outcome for a single node.

nodeId.description: Id of the node that was executed.

ran.description: True when the node actually ran (was not skipped or blocked).

halted.description: True when execution was halted at or after this node.

summary.description: Short prose summary of what the execution did.

effects.description: List of observable effects produced by this execution.

executions.description: Execution records for every dispatched node, in run order.
